revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初九]][[zh:二月初九]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 9|qq=February 9}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Tianzhi Tennō|1=Emperor Tenji}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|664|en|664|qid=Q30621|lt=664|1=664}} {{ill|March 11|en|March 11|qid=Q2398|lt=March 11|1=March 11}}) – Issued the "Kōshi no Kaikaku Rei" (Reform Edict of Jiazi), establishing 26 new court Ranks. * {{ill|Eiryaku|en|Eiryaku|qid=Q1193895|lt=Eireki|1=Eiryaku}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1160|en|1160|qid=Q19662|lt=1160|1=1160}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – After his defeat in the Heiji Rebellion, {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|qid=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} was captured by the retainer {{ill|Taira no Sadamori|ja|平頼盛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Sadamori|1=Taira no Yorimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11061301}}’s subordinate, {{ill|Taira no Munetada|ja|平宗清|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Munetada|1=Taira no Munekiyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11482412}}. * {{ill|Kōō|en|Kōō|qid=Q1146172|lt=Kangō|1=Kōō}} 1st year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|qid=Q1146236|lt=Genchū|1=Genchū}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1389|en|1389|qid=Q6371|lt=1389|1=1389}} {{ill|March 7|en|March 7|qid=Q2394|lt=March 7|1=March 7}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Kakyō (Japan)|ja|嘉慶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakyō (Japan)|1=Kakēi (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11419403}} to {{ill|Kōō|en|Kōō|qid=Q1146172|lt=Kangō|1=Kōō}} via an era change. == Births == * {{ill|Eikyō|en|Eikyō|qid=Q1193059|lt=Eikyō|1=Eikyō}} 6th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1434|en|1434|qid=Q6360|lt=1434|1=1434}} {{ill|March 19|en|March 19|qid=Q2424|lt=March 19|1=March 19}}) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshikatsu|en|Ashikaga Yoshikatsu|qid=Q455351|lt=Ashikaga Yoshikatsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshikatsu}}, the 7th shōgun of the Ashikaga Shogunate (died {{ill|1443|en|1443|qid=Q6417|lt=1443|1=1443}}). * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1533|en|1533|qid=Q6443|lt=1533|1=1533}} {{ill|March 4|en|March 4|qid=Q2396|lt=March 4|1=March 4}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Yoshihisa|en|Shimazu Yoshihisa|qid=Q955727|lt=Shimazu Yoshihiro|1=Shimazu Yoshihisa}}, a military commander (born {{ill|?|en|?|qid=Q87496154|lt=?|1=?}}; died {{ill|1611|en|1611|qid=Q6768|lt=1611|1=1611}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1834|en|1834|qid=Q7591|lt=1834|1=1834}} {{ill|March 18|en|March 18|qid=Q2422|lt=March 18|1=March 18}}) – {{ill|Etō Shinpei|en|Etō Shinpei|qid=Q1202291|lt=Eto Shinpei|1=Etō Shinpei}}, a politician during the Meiji Restoration period (died {{ill|1874|en|1874|qid=Q7761|lt=1874|1=1874}}). * {{ill|Kōka|en|Kōka|qid=Q1325317|lt=Kōka|1=Kōka}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1845|en|1845|qid=Q7636|lt=1845|1=1845}} {{ill|March 16|en|March 16|qid=Q2417|lt=March 16|1=March 16}}) – {{ill|Hamagatani Fujitarō (1st generation)|ja|初代梅ヶ谷藤太郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamagatani Fujitarō (1st generation)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the 15th Yokozuna (died {{ill|1928|en|1928|qid=Q19715|lt=1928|1=1928}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|March 15|en|March 15|qid=Q2403|lt=March 15|1=March 15}}) – {{ill|Hara Takashi|en|Hara Takashi|qid=Q315553|lt=Hara Takemin|1=Hara Takashi}}, the 19th Prime Minister of Japan (died {{ill|1921|en|1921|qid=Q2162|lt=1921|1=1921}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1786|en|1786|qid=Q7760|lt=1786|1=1786}} {{ill|March 8|en|March 8|qid=Q2395|lt=March 8|1=March 8}}) – {{ill|Teshima Doan|ja|手島堵庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teshima Doan|1=Tejima Toan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11497006}}, a scholar of Shingaku (born {{ill|1718|en|1718|qid=Q6899|lt=1718|1=1718}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|8|2|10|1|9|3|2|0209|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 9일]] [[ja:2月9日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初九]]
[[ar:February 9 (Lunisolar)]]
